compiled_state.title: dso:sprint Skill tool invocation falls back to manual SKILL.md read instead of auto-executing skill
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description: When the user invokes /dso:sprint via the Skill tool, the skill system returns 'Launching skill: dso:sprint' but does not automatically load and execute the SKILL.md content. The orchestrator then falls back to manually reading plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md using the Read tool, which is a workaround rather than the intended session-start auto-load behavior. The Skill tool should deliver the skill content directly so the orchestrator can follow it without a separate Read call.

comments.body: Classification: llm-behavioral — ticket references agent guidance/skill behavior gap. Gate 1a: skipped — CLI_user tag present; intent-aligned assumed.
comments.author: Test

comments.body: Fix applied: added negative constraint 'do NOT also read the skill file' to success branch of all 23 .claude/commands/*.md files. Root cause: Positional Bias — using-lockpick prohibition too distant from point of use; command file success path was silent on what NOT to do after Skill tool succeeds.
comments.author: Test
